news.title: SLU Students, Alumnus Awarded NSF Graduate Research Fellowships
news.summary_en: Three Saint Louis University students and one recent alumnus have been awarded highly competitive National Science Foundation (NSF) Graduate Research Fellowship Programs (GRFP) for 2026. The fellowship recognizes outstanding academic achievement and the potential to make significant contributions to research and society.

news.title: SSM Health, Saint Louis University partner on RN-to-BSN program
news.summary_en: A new preferred-provider agreement enables SSM Health nurses to complete a degree in as little as one year while benefiting from tuition reimbursement.
